title: boesenbergia islamii
intro: Boesenbergia islamii, also known as the "Copper Ginger" or "Malaysian Ginger", is a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include relieving pain and inflammation, reducing fever, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and cholesterol levels. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are made by drying the roots and rhizomes of the plant.
